narrative:
Precinct Aurora 1-A (precinct in Portage County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
